/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 CMakeFiles/server.dir/Kserver.cc.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/__/user.pb.cc.o -o ../../../bin/server   -L/root/Krpc-all/Krpc/thirdparty/muduo-cpp17/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/root/Krpc-all/Krpc/thirdparty/muduo-cpp17/lib ../../../lib/libkrpc_core.a -lprotobuf -lpthread -lzookeeper_mt -lmuduo_core -lglog
